description_long: This armchair features a modern, minimalist design with a sturdy wooden frame and straight, angular armrests. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned, upholstered in a smooth, solid-colored fabric that appears soft and comfortable. The armrests are made of light-colored wood, contrasting with the darker fabric of the cushions. The legs are also wooden, straight, and slightly angled for stability, giving the chair a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The backrest is medium height, rectangular, and slightly reclined for ergonomic support. Overall, the chair exudes a blend of comfort and style, suitable for urban parks, public seating areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern armchair with a wooden frame, straight armrests, and plush, solid-colored cushions. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the seat, backrest, and both wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the cushions and the straight, angular wooden armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cushioned backrest and the wooden frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest and cushion depth from the opposite angle.
attribute_armrest_design: straight, flat, wooden armrests with angular edges
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, rectangular, cushioned backrest with a slight recline
